body.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 700 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="乘法分配律把括号外的因数分给括号内每一项的示意图">
        <defs>
          <marker id="arw" markerWidth="9" markerHeight="9" refX="7" refY="4.5" orient="auto">
            <path d="M0,0 L9,4.5 L0,9 z" fill="#0A5E76"/>
          </marker>
        </defs>
        <g font-family="Noto Sans SC, sans-serif">
          <text x="350" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#8A9795">括号外的数，要分给括号里的每一项——一项都不能漏</text>

          <text x="150" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="#15201F">2 ( x + 3 )</text>

          <!-- 2 -> x -->
          <path d="M108 118 C 108 150, 300 150, 470 118" fill="none" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arw)"/>
          <!-- 2 -> 3 -->
          <path d="M108 118 C 108 172, 420 172, 560 118" fill="none" stroke="#15A06A" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arw)"/>

          <text x="470" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-size="26" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">2·x</text>
          <text x="525" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-size="26" font-weight="700" fill="#15201F">+</text>
          <text x="575" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-size="26" font-weight="700" fill="#0F7D52">2·3</text>

          <text x="520" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" fill="#4C5A58">= 2x + 6</text>
        </g>
      </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 700 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="去括号解方程的五步路线图">
        <defs>
          <marker id="arw2" markerWidth="9" markerHeight="9" refX="7" refY="4.5" orient="auto">
            <path d="M0,0 L9,4.5 L0,9 z" fill="#0A5E76"/>
          </marker>
        </defs>
        <g font-family="Noto Sans SC, sans-serif" font-size="13">
          <rect x="10"  y="46" width="120" height="58" rx="9" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#15A06A"/>
          <text x="70"  y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0F7D52">① 去括号</text>
          <text x="70"  y="90" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4C5A58" font-size="11">分配律拆开</text>

          <rect x="152" y="46" width="120" height="58" rx="9" fill="#E1F1F5" stroke="#0E7C9B"/>
          <text x="212" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">② 合并</text>
          <text x="212" y="90" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4C5A58" font-size="11">两边各变短</text>

          <rect x="294" y="46" width="120" height="58" rx="9" fill="#E1F1F5" stroke="#0E7C9B"/>
          <text x="354" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">③ 移项</text>
          <text x="354" y="90" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4C5A58" font-size="11">未知数归一边</text>

          <rect x="436" y="46" width="120" height="58" rx="9" fill="#E1F1F5" stroke="#0E7C9B"/>
          <text x="496" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">④ 除系数</text>
          <text x="496" y="90" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4C5A58" font-size="11">系数变成 1</text>

          <rect x="578" y="46" width="112" height="58" rx="9" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#15A06A"/>
          <text x="634" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0F7D52">⑤ 检验</text>
          <text x="634" y="90" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4C5A58" font-size="11">代入原方程</text>

          <line x1="130" y1="75" x2="150" y2="75" stroke="#0A5E76" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arw2)"/>
          <line x1="272" y1="75" x2="292" y2="75" stroke="#0A5E76" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arw2)"/>
          <line x1="414" y1="75" x2="434" y2="75" stroke="#0A5E76" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arw2)"/>
          <line x1="556" y1="75" x2="576" y2="75" stroke="#0A5E76" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arw2)"/>

          <text x="350" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#8A9795">只在最前面加了"去括号"一步，后四步就是上一课的老路线</text>
          <text x="350" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#8A9795">括号拆完，问题就变回已经会解的普通方程</text>
        </g>
      </svg>
